metaTitle: Boiler Installation in London | Local Gas Engineer
metaDescription: Need boiler installation in London? Get clear advice on replacement boilers, system suitability and installation visits from a Gas Safe engineer.
intro: If your current boiler is unreliable, uneconomical or beyond sensible repair, we provide boiler installation support across London with practical advice on the right replacement setup.
pricingGuidance: Boiler installation pricing depends on the boiler model, system changes and flue or controls work, with quotes built around the property and heating demand.
localProof: We help London homeowners and landlords plan boiler replacements that suit the property rather than pushing a one-size-fits-all option.

sections.heading: When replacement is usually worth considering
sections.body: Replacement makes more sense when repair costs are stacking up, the boiler is repeatedly failing or the system is no longer suitable for the property.

sections.heading: What an installation plan should cover
sections.body: A proper installation plan looks at output, controls, flue position, condensate routing and any system upgrades needed for safe, reliable operation.

sections.heading: Why customers ask us before replacing a boiler
sections.body: We explain repair-versus-replacement tradeoffs clearly, so you can decide whether a new boiler is justified or whether the existing appliance still has a sensible repair route.
